description_long: This is a heavily modified, futuristic pickup truck with a rugged, weathered exterior and a dark, metallic finish. The vehicle features exposed mechanical components, such as visible engine parts, pipes, and what appear to be thruster-like devices instead of traditional wheels, suggesting it may be designed for hovering or advanced mobility. The cab is reinforced with metal bars and grilles, and the roof is equipped with solar panels, adding to its utilitarian, post-apocalyptic aesthetic. The rear cargo bed is partially enclosed with additional framework and storage compartments, while the sides display industrial details like vents, hoses, and external fuel tanks. Yellow accent lines and hazard markings are visible throughout, enhancing its high-tech, utilitarian look. The overall design blends elements of classic pickup trucks with sci-fi and dystopian influences, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A rugged, futuristic pickup truck with a weathered metallic finish, exposed mechanical parts, and thruster-like devices instead of wheels. It features solar panels, reinforced bars, and a partially enclosed cargo bed with industrial details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced grille, exposed engine, and thruster-like devices replacing the front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solar panels on the roof, side vents, and the extended framework around the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the enclosed cargo bed, rear thrusters, and hazard markings on the tailgate.
description_view_3: Right side view displays external fuel tanks, hoses, and additional mechanical details along the side.
